title: Mounted Local Studio Audits Route
summary: Mounted the Studio Audits route shell in the local Studio app server and retired the old Jekyll route shell.
effect: The local Studio app now serves /studio/audits/?mode=manage with the existing vanilla Studio Audits browser module and route-ready contract. The route keeps the existing unavailable-service behavior when the audit service on 127.0.0.1:8790 is not running, and the old Jekyll /studio/audits/ shell has been removed. The audit API remains a sibling service for a later route-family API consolidation slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, view, config, and smoke files
